summary: Phase 3 testing completed successfully - all 4 new features (Market Comparison, Weekly Control, Refill Trends, Scale Planner) working perfectly with backend APIs and frontend UI integration
passed_tests: Market Comparison API (/api/dashboard/market-comparison) - returns 4 markets ranked by profit
Weekly Control API (/api/dashboard/weekly-control) - returns 7 weeks of financial data
Refill Trends API (/api/dashboard/refill-trends) - returns 10 products with cost tracking
Scale Planner API (/api/dashboard/scale-planner) - calculates growth projections correctly
Market Comparison UI (/compare) - displays ranking cards, radar chart, and comparison table
Weekly Control UI (/weekly) - shows KPIs, trend charts, and weekly breakdown table
Refill Trends UI (/refill) - displays cost trends and purchase history
Scale Planner UI (/scale) - interactive controls, growth metrics, and projections
Navigation sidebar - all 17 menu items present and functional
All existing Phase 1 & 2 features remain intact (27/27 backend tests passing)

success_percentage.frontend: 100% (all 4 new pages working with charts and interactions)
